text:
Hi Rainer,

Here the setup:

% uname -a
FreeBSD mizar.xyzzy 10.2-RELEASE-p14 FreeBSD 10.2-RELEASE-p14 #6 r297052M: Sun Mar 20 09:35:44 CET 2016     root@v904.xyzzy:/.../hal/z/OBJ/FreeBSD/amd64/releng/10.2/sys/XYZZY_SMP  amd64

Reading kml files: I am adding a vector layer and there select a KML file.

Updating plugins: I have selected Plugins -> Manage and Install Plugins -> Installed -> Upgrade all.

Thank you for your work!

-- Martin
